name: Pineapple-Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
Combine 1/4 cup cold milk and gelatin in container of an electric blender. Process at low speed to soften gelatin.
Heat 1/2 cup milk in small saucepan. Add to gelatin mixture and process until gelatin granules dissolve. Scrape sides of blender with spatula.
Add sugar and next five ingredients; blend until smooth. Drain pineapple, reserving 3 tablespoons syrup. Add reserved syrup to blender mixture; process until smooth. Pour into crust. Chill 3 hours or until firm. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
